title: Copper Nugget
description: Adds Copper Nuggets to be crafted from Copper Ingots.
body:
![Header Copper Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40c35a81f27e2dbf4bd993dea5bf06bd650b6d7c.png) ###
This lightweight Fabric mod introduces **Copper Nuggets** to your game, giving copper the same flexibility as iron and gold.

# **1 Copper Ingot = 9 Copper Nuggets** ![Copper Nugget Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ff61f26320e28bcef35710109d42e862c8a891d.png) **9 Copper Nuggets = 1 Copper Ingot** ![Copper Ingot Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cfd251be906605c147fdaf861478d85340501cd.png) _Works just like Iron and Gold Nuggets for crafting and storage._ **Smelting Lightning Rods makes a Copper Nugget** ![Copper Nugget Smelting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e93b17099e3dbca1952c7ed9be8ed5fe13b89a0.gif) # Whether you're fine-tuning your inventory, building with precision, or creating custom recipes, the Copper Nugget Mod is a simple addition to your Minecraft world.
